少し手伝ってもらえないかしら。

/ci2 1 ……ありがとう。助かったわ。
これからもよろしく。

/ci4 3 これ以上は危険よ！

/ci1 5 Hey...
Sorry, but would you mind lending a hand?

/ci1 1 We did it, with your help.
I appreciate it.

/ci4 3 We couldn't defeat them all...

/ci1 2 You...
Please, join me in battle.

Is everyone ok?
